channel.title: Posts on Peter Wambua's blog for robots :|

item.title: Hack Wireless Networks
item.description: maybe some code? from django.shortcuts import render import pdfkit, requests, logging # Create your views here. def index(request): #logger.info('index page') return render(request, 'home.html')
item.content:
maybe some code?

from django.shortcuts import render
import pdfkit, requests, logging

# Create your views here.
def index(request):
    #logger.info('index page')
    return render(request, 'home.html')
